description: CompositionGrey kurta made of 100% cotton, with diagonal floral print, short sleeves, Mandarin collar neck, two pleats on the mid bust and mid back chest, and has a curved hem with split side seamsFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this grey floral printed kurta from w! Look ethnically hip with its styled pleats on the mid-bust and the heavily curved hem, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
